mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_h5_user_ai_provider WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_h5_user_ai_provider ( user_id, provider_mode, provider_source, model_name, vision_model_name, audio_model_name, stt_model_name, stt_provider_source, stt_api_key_cipher, stt_custom_url, tts_model_name, tts_voice_name, tts_voice_template_code, tts_provider_source, tts_api_key_cipher, tts_custom_url, image_model_name, image_provider_source, image_api_key_cipher, image_custom_url, image_character_consistency_mode, image_reference_source_mode, api_key_cipher, custom_url, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{providerMode}, #{providerSource}, #{modelName}, #{visionModelName}, #{audioModelName}, #{sttModelName}, #{sttProviderSource}, #{sttApiKeyCipher}, #{sttCustomUrl}, #{ttsModelName}, #{ttsVoiceName}, #{ttsVoiceTemplateCode}, #{ttsProviderSource}, #{ttsApiKeyCipher}, #{ttsCustomUrl}, #{imageModelName}, #{imageProviderSource}, #{imageApiKeyCipher}, #{imageCustomUrl}, #{imageCharacterConsistencyMode}, #{imageReferenceSourceMode}, #{apiKeyCipher}, #{customUrl}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE provider_mode = VALUES(provider_mode), provider_source = VALUES(provider_source), model_name = VALUES(model_name), vision_model_name = VALUES(vision_model_name), audio_model_name = VALUES(audio_model_name), stt_model_name = VALUES(stt_model_name), stt_provider_source = VALUES(stt_provider_source), stt_api_key_cipher = VALUES(stt_api_key_cipher), stt_custom_url = VALUES(stt_custom_url), tts_model_name = VALUES(tts_model_name), tts_voice_name = VALUES(tts_voice_name), tts_voice_template_code = VALUES(tts_voice_template_code), tts_provider_source = VALUES(tts_provider_source), tts_api_key_cipher = VALUES(tts_api_key_cipher), tts_custom_url = VALUES(tts_custom_url), image_model_name = VALUES(image_model_name), image_provider_source = VALUES(image_provider_source), image_api_key_cipher = VALUES(image_api_key_cipher), image_custom_url = VALUES(image_custom_url), image_character_consistency_mode = VALUES(image_character_consistency_mode), image_reference_source_mode = VALUES(image_reference_source_mode), api_key_cipher = VALUES(api_key_cipher), custom_url = VALUES(custom_url), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
